title: Frog Knight
move_pattern: Starts with Tongue Lash. Normal cycle: Tongue Lash → Strike Down Evil → For the Queen → Tongue Lash. Once per fight, after For the Queen, if HP is below 50% and Beetle Charge has not yet been used, uses Beetle Charge instead, then resumes the cycle with Tongue Lash.
notes: Begins combat with 19 Plating. Beetle Charge is a one-time phase move triggered after For the Queen when HP drops below 50% — once used, the cycle returns permanently to Tongue Lash after For the Queen.
